sources.title: Journals of the House of Representatives of New Zealand 2010-2011
sources.coverage_note: Weekly Journal PDF with sitting-date pages and clause-by-clause proceedings.

sources.title: Journals of the House of Representatives of New Zealand 2014-2017
sources.coverage_note: Sessional schedules volume for the 51st Parliament, with index and tables of proceedings.

sources.title: Journals of the House of Representatives of New Zealand 2017-2020
sources.coverage_note: Sessional schedules volume for the 52nd Parliament, including comparative table of sittings.

authoritative_statements.claim: The Clerk notes all proceedings of the House and publishes them as the Journals of the House.
The Journals are published in draft, weekly, and sessional stages.

notes: These are confirmed official PDF export surfaces, not the final reconciliation result.
They provide a stable machine-readable path around the HTML challenge layer.
